location.description: Region where the backup vault is created.
location.rationale: Controls data residency and compliance for where backups are stored.

name.description: The resource name of the backup vault. Needs to be unique per location.

description.description: An optional description of this resource.

labels.description: Labels as key value pairs. Example: `{ "owner": "Bob", "department": "finance", "purpose": "testing" }`. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

backup_vault_type.description: Type of the backup vault to be created. Default is IN_REGION. Possible values are: `BACKUP_VAULT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED`, `IN_REGION`, `CROSS_REGION`.

backup_region.description: Region in which backup is stored.

backup_retention_policy.description: Backup retention policy defining the retention of the backups. Structure is [documented below](#nested_backup_retention_policy).

backup_minimum_enforced_retention_days.description: Minimum retention duration in days for backups in the backup vault.

daily_backup_immutable.description: Indicates if the daily backups are immutable. At least one of daily_backup_immutable, weekly_backup_immutable, monthly_backup_immutable and manual_backup_immutable must be true.

weekly_backup_immutable.description: Indicates if the weekly backups are immutable. At least one of daily_backup_immutable, weekly_backup_immutable, monthly_backup_immutable and manual_backup_immutable must be true.

monthly_backup_immutable.description: Indicates if the monthly backups are immutable. At least one of daily_backup_immutable, weekly_backup_immutable, monthly_backup_immutable and manual_backup_immutable must be true.

manual_backup_immutable.description: Indicates if the manual backups are immutable. At least one of daily_backup_immutable, weekly_backup_immutable, monthly_backup_immutable and manual_backup_immutable must be true.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
